turns.query: Analyze pollution levels and emission impacts between Ligong station and North Pump House station on 2025-06-25, considering nearby enterprise activities.
turns.actual_response:
从查询结果中，我们没有找到名为"Ligong"或"North Pump House"的站点。请确认这些站点的正确名称或ID。以下是所有站点的名称和ID列表：

```plaintext
id              name
1764               东卯镇

1791     承德县甲山镇环境空气自动站
1792     承德县六沟镇环境空气自动站
...
2799  1785              偏桥子镇
2800  1786  （河北承德双滦经济开发区）西地镇
2801  1787              陈栅子镇
2802  1788         北马圈子镇社区医院
```

请提供正确的站点名称或ID，以便我们继续分析。

code_snippets:
import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# Resolve station ids
query_ligong_id = text("SELECT id FROM air_quality_station WHERE name = 'Ligong'")
ligong_id = pd.read_sql(query_ligong_id, engine).iloc[0]['id']
print(f'RESOLVED: Ligong = {ligong_id}')

query_pumphouse_id = text("SELECT id FROM air_quality_station WHERE name = 'North Pump House'")
pumphouse_id = pd.read_sql(query_pumphouse_id, engine).iloc[0]['id']
print(f'RESOLVED: North Pump House = {pumphouse_id}')

# Fetch raw pollution data for Ligong station on 2025-06-25
query_ligong_data = text(f"""
SELECT aqi, pm2_5, timestamp
FROM hourly_station_air_quality
WHERE station_id = {ligong_id} AND timestamp >= '2025-06-25 00:00:00' AND timestamp < '2025-06-26 00:00:00'
""")
ligong_data = pd.read_sql(query_ligong_data, engine)
print(f'Ligong station data row count: {len(ligong_data)}')

# Fetch raw pollution data for North Pump House station on 2025-06-25
query_pumphouse_data = text(f"""
SELECT aqi, pm2_5, timestamp
FROM hourly_station_air_quality
WHERE station_id = {pumphouse_id} AND timestamp >= '2025-06-25 00:00:00' AND timestamp < '2025-06-26 00:00:00'
""")
pumphouse_data = pd.read_sql(query_pumphouse_data, engine)
print(f'North Pump House station data row count: {len(pumphouse_data)}')

# Re-check the resolution of station ids
query_ligong_id = text("SELECT id FROM air_quality_station WHERE name = 'Ligong'")
ligong_id_df = pd.read_sql(query_ligong_id, engine)

if ligong_id_df.empty:
    print('UNRESOLVED: Ligong')
else:
    ligong_id = ligong_id_df.iloc[0]['id']
    print(f'RESOLVED: Ligong = {ligong_id}')

query_pumphouse_id = text("SELECT id FROM air_quality_station WHERE name = 'North Pump House'")
pumphouse_id_df = pd.read_sql(query_pumphouse_id, engine)

if pumphouse_id_df.empty:
    print('UNRESOLVED: North Pump House')
else:
    pumphouse_id = pumphouse_id_df.iloc[0]['id']
    print(f'RESOLVED: North Pump House = {pumphouse_id}')

# Attempt fuzzy resolution for Ligong station
query_ligong_id_fuzzy = text("SELECT id FROM air_quality_station WHERE name ILIKE 'Ligong%'")
ligong_id_df_fuzzy = pd.read_sql(query_ligong_id_fuzzy, engine)

if ligong_id_df_fuzzy.empty:
    print('UNRESOLVED: Ligong')
else:
    ligong_id = ligong_id_df_fuzzy.iloc[0]['id']
    print(f'RESOLVED: Ligong = {ligong_id}')

# Attempt fuzzy resolution for North Pump House station
query_pumphouse_id_fuzzy = text("SELECT id FROM air_quality_station WHERE name ILIKE 'North Pump House%'")
pumphouse_id_df_fuzzy = pd.read_sql(query_pumphouse_id_fuzzy, engine)

if pumphouse_id_df_fuzzy.empty:
    print('UNRESOLVED: North Pump House')
else:
    pumphouse_id = pumphouse_id_df_fuzzy.iloc[0]['id']
    print(f'RESOLVED: North Pump House = {pumphouse_id}')

# Since both stations are unresolved, we will stop here and report the issue
print('无法解析 Ligong 和 North Pump House 站点的 ID。请检查站点名称是否正确。')

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# 获取Ligong站和North Pump House站在2025-06-25的PM2.5和AQI的平均值

# 查询Ligong站的数据
query_ligong = text("""
SELECT AVG(pm2_5) as mean_pm25, AVG(aqi) as mean_aqi
FROM hourly_station_air_quality
JOIN air_quality_station ON hourly_station_air_quality.station_id = air_quality_station.id
WHERE air_quality_station.name = 'Ligong' AND DATE(timestamp) = '2025-06-25'
""")

# 查询North Pump House站的数据
query_pumphouse = text("""
SELECT AVG(pm2_5) as mean_pm25, AVG(aqi) as mean_aqi
FROM hourly_station_air_quality
JOIN air_quality_station ON hourly_station_air_quality.station_id = air_quality_station.id
WHERE air_quality_station.name = 'North Pump House' AND DATE(timestamp) = '2025-06-25'
""")

# 执行查询
ligong_data = pd.read_sql(query_ligong, engine)
pumphouse_data = pd.read_sql(query_pumphouse, engine)

# 提取结果
mean_pm25_ligong_intermediate = ligong_data['mean_pm25'].iloc[0]
mean_aqi_ligong_intermediate = ligong_data['mean_aqi'].iloc[0]
mean_pm25_pumphouse_intermediate = pumphouse_data['mean_pm25'].iloc[0]
mean_aqi_pumphouse_intermediate = pumphouse_data['mean_aqi'].iloc[0]

print(f"North Pump House站2025-06-25的PM2.5均值: {mean_pm25_pumphouse_intermediate}")

# 执行查询

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# 获取 Ligong 站点和 North Pump House 站点的 ID
ligong_id = ligong_id_df['id'].iloc[0]
pumphouse_id = pumphouse_id_df['id'].iloc[0]

# 定义查询时间范围
start_time = '2025-06-25 00:00:00'
end_time = '2025-06-26 00:00:00'

# 查询 Ligong 站点和 North Pump House 站点的 PM2.5 和 AQI 数据
query_ligong = text(f"""
SELECT AVG(pm2_5) AS mean_pm25, AVG(aqi) AS mean_aqi
FROM hourly_station_air_quality
WHERE station_id = {ligong_id} AND timestamp >= '{start_time}' AND timestamp < '{end_time}'
""")

query_pumphouse = text(f"""
SELECT AVG(pm2_5) AS mean_pm25, AVG(aqi) AS mean_aqi
FROM hourly_station_air_quality
WHERE station_id = {pumphouse_id} AND timestamp >= '{start_time}' AND timestamp < '{end_time}'
""")

# 执行查询
ligong_data = pd.read_sql(query_ligong, engine)
pumphouse_data = pd.read_sql(query_pumphouse, engine)

# 打印结果
print(f"Ligong 站点的 PM2.5 和 AQI 平均值：\n{ligong_data}")
print(f"North Pump House 站点的 PM2.5 和 AQI 平均值：\n{pumphouse_data}")

# 存储结果
ligong_mean_pm25 = ligong_data['mean_pm25'].iloc[0]
ligong_mean_aqi = ligong_data['mean_aqi'].iloc[0]
pumphouse_mean_pm25 = pumphouse_data['mean_pm25'].iloc[0]
pumphouse_mean_aqi = pumphouse_data['mean_aqi'].iloc[0]

# 查询 Ligong 站点和 North Pump House 站点周边 10 公里内的企业排放数据
query_ligong_emissions = text(f"""
SELECT pc.name AS company_name, pc.industry_type, pc.coordinate, AVG(dpe.exhaust_gas) AS mean_exhaust_gas, AVG(dpe.nox) AS mean_nox, AVG(dpe.so2) AS mean_so2, AVG(dpe.pm) AS mean_pm, AVG(dpe.co) AS mean_co
FROM polluting_company pc
JOIN daily_polluting_company_emission dpe ON pc.id = dpe.company_id
WHERE ST_DWithin(pc.coordinate, (SELECT coordinate FROM air_quality_station WHERE id = {ligong_id}), 10000) AND dpe.date = '2025-06-25'
GROUP BY pc.name, pc.industry_type, pc.coordinate
""")

query_pumphouse_emissions = text(f"""
SELECT pc.name AS company_name, pc.industry_type, pc.coordinate, AVG(dpe.exhaust_gas) AS mean_exhaust_gas, AVG(dpe.nox) AS mean_nox, AVG(dpe.so2) AS mean_so2, AVG(dpe.pm) AS mean_pm, AVG(dpe.co) AS mean_co
FROM polluting_company pc
JOIN daily_polluting_company_emission dpe ON pc.id = dpe.company_id
WHERE ST_DWithin(pc.coordinate, (SELECT coordinate FROM air_quality_station WHERE id = {pumphouse_id}), 10000) AND dpe.date = '2025-06-25'
GROUP BY pc.name, pc.industry_type, pc.coordinate
""")

# 执行查询
ligong_emissions = pd.read_sql(query_ligong_emissions, engine)
pumphouse_emissions = pd.read_sql(query_pumphouse_emissions, engine)

# 打印结果
print(f"Ligong 站点周边 10 公里内的企业排放数据：\n{ligong_emissions}")
print(f"North Pump House 站点周边 10 公里内的企业排放数据：\n{pumphouse_emissions}")

pumphouse_emissions_data = pumphouse_emissions

query_pumphouse_id = text("SELECT id FROM air_quality_station WHERE name = 'North Pump House'")

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# Query to get the mean PM2.5 and AQI for Ligong station on 2025-06-25
query_ligong = text("""
SELECT AVG(pm2_5) AS mean_pm25, AVG(aqi) AS mean_aqi
FROM hourly_station_air_quality
WHERE station_id = (SELECT id FROM air_quality_station WHERE name = 'Ligong')
AND timestamp >= '2025-06-25 00:00:00' AND timestamp < '2025-06-26 00:00:00'
""")

# Query to get the mean PM2.5 and AQI for North Pump House station on 2025-06-25
query_pumphouse = text("""
SELECT AVG(pm2_5) AS mean_pm25, AVG(aqi) AS mean_aqi
FROM hourly_station_air_quality
WHERE station_id = (SELECT id FROM air_quality_station WHERE name = 'North Pump House')
AND timestamp >= '2025-06-25 00:00:00' AND timestamp < '2025-06-26 00:00:00'
""")

# Execute the queries
ligong_data = pd.read_sql(query_ligong, engine)
pumphouse_data = pd.read_sql(query_pumphouse, engine)

# Extract the mean values
mean_pm25_ligong = ligong_data['mean_pm25'].iloc[0]
mean_aqi_ligong = ligong_data['mean_aqi'].iloc[0]
mean_pm25_pumphouse = pumphouse_data['mean_pm25'].iloc[0]
mean_aqi_pumphouse = pumphouse_data['mean_aqi'].iloc[0]

# Print the results to confirm they are set
print(f"mean_pm25_ligong: {mean_pm25_ligong}")
print(f"mean_aqi_ligong: {mean_aqi_ligong}")
print(f"mean_pm25_pumphouse: {mean_pm25_pumphouse}")
print(f"mean_aqi_pumphouse: {mean_aqi_pumphouse}")

AND timestamp >= '2025-06-25 00:00:00' AND timestamp < '2025-06-26 00:00:00'
""")

WHERE station_id = (SELECT id FROM air_quality_station WHERE name = 'North Pump House')
AND timestamp >= '2025-06-25 00:00:00' AND timestamp < '2025-06-26 00:00:00'
""")

# Execute the queries again
ligong_data = pd.read_sql(query_ligong, engine)
pumphouse_data = pd.read_sql(query_pumphouse, engine)

# Extract the mean values
mean_pm25_ligong = ligong_data['mean_pm25'].iloc[0]
mean_aqi_ligong = ligong_data['mean_aqi'].iloc[0]
mean_pm25_pumphouse = pumphouse_data['mean_pm25'].iloc[0]
mean_aqi_pumphouse = pumphouse_data['mean_aqi'].iloc[0]

# Print the results to confirm they are set
print(f"mean_pm25_ligong: {mean_pm25_ligong}")
print(f"mean_aqi_ligong: {mean_aqi_ligong}")
print(f"mean_pm25_pumphouse: {mean_pm25_pumphouse}")
print(f"mean_aqi_pumphouse: {mean_aqi_pumphouse}")

# Check if the station IDs are correctly resolved
query_ligong_id = text("SELECT id FROM air_quality_station WHERE name = 'Ligong'")
query_pumphouse_id = text("SELECT id FROM air_quality_station WHERE name = 'North Pump House'")

ligong_id = pd.read_sql(query_ligong_id, engine)
pumphouse_id = pd.read_sql(query_pumphouse_id, engine)

# Print the station IDs to confirm they are set
print(f"ligong_id: {ligong_id}")
print(f"pumphouse_id: {pumphouse_id}")

# If the station IDs are not found, re-execute the queries with the correct IDs

    print("One or both station IDs are not found. Please check the station names and try again.")

    FROM hourly_station_air_quality

    """)

    # Execute the queries again
    ligong_data = pd.read_sql(query_ligong, engine)
    pumphouse_data = pd.read_sql(query_pumphouse, engine)

    # Extract the mean values
    mean_pm25_ligong = ligong_data['mean_pm25'].iloc[0]
    mean_aqi_ligong = ligong_data['mean_aqi'].iloc[0]
    mean_pm25_pumphouse = pumphouse_data['mean_pm25'].iloc[0]
    mean_aqi_pumphouse = pumphouse_data['mean_aqi'].iloc[0]

    # Print the results to confirm they are set
    print(f"mean_pm25_ligong: {mean_pm25_ligong}")
    print(f"mean_aqi_ligong: {mean_aqi_ligong}")
    print(f"mean_pm25_pumphouse: {mean_pm25_pumphouse}")
    print(f"mean_aqi_pumphouse: {mean_aqi_pumphouse}")

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# 查询Ligong站和North Pump House站的ID
query_ligong_id = text("SELECT id FROM air_quality_station WHERE name = 'Ligong'")
query_pumphouse_id = text("SELECT id FROM air_quality_station WHERE name = 'North Pump House'")

ligong_id_df = pd.read_sql(query_ligong_id, engine)
pumphouse_id_df = pd.read_sql(query_pumphouse_id, engine)

ligong_id = ligong_id_df.iloc[0, 0]
pumphouse_id = pumphouse_id_df.iloc[0, 0]

# 查询2025-06-25当天Ligong站的PM2.5和AQI平均值
query_ligong = text(f"""
SELECT AVG(pm2_5) AS mean_pm25, AVG(aqi) AS mean_aqi
FROM hourly_station_air_quality
WHERE station_id = {ligong_id} AND timestamp >= '2025-06-25 00:00:00' AND timestamp < '2025-06-26 00:00:00'
""")

ligong_data = pd.read_sql(query_ligong, engine)

# 查询2025-06-25当天North Pump House站的PM2.5和AQI平均值
query_pumphouse = text(f"""
SELECT AVG(pm2_5) AS mean_pm25, AVG(aqi) AS mean_aqi
FROM hourly_station_air_quality
WHERE station_id = {pumphouse_id} AND timestamp >= '2025-06-25 00:00:00' AND timestamp < '2025-06-26 00:00:00'
""")

pumphouse_data = pd.read_sql(query_pumphouse, engine)

mean_pm25_ligong = ligong_data.iloc[0]['mean_pm25']
mean_aqi_ligong = ligong_data.iloc[0]['mean_aqi']
mean_pm25_pumphouse = pumphouse_data.iloc[0]['mean_pm25']
mean_aqi_pumphouse = pumphouse_data.iloc[0]['mean_aqi']
